chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 181 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.12/2025 (E/A) 3. For hearing of main case 21.01.2026 Mr. Waqar Ahmed Abro, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant submits statement along with photocopy of order passed in Cr. Bail Application No. S-1079 of 2025, whereby bail application was required to be withdrawn on account of being required to approach before the competent Court. Learned Counsel for the applicant also requires this bail application to be withdrawn reserving his right to approach the competent Court. Ordered accordingly. Bail application stands disposed of as not pressed along with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
